patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Abyssal Depths Update
description: Abyssal Depths Update Combat Balance Changes (30 June 2025) — Arcane Staffs, Axes, Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Swords, War Gloves, Offhands, Helmets, Shoes, Battle Mounts, Miscellaneous.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: These changes aim to address the power of highly repeatable Q mobility spells, alongside minor QoL adjustments to many abilities.
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Resilience Penetration 50% 35% Time Freeze Great Arcane Staff Energy Cost Cooldown Cooldown reduction Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe Razor Cut Bear Paws Lifesteal Bows Deadly Shot Range Enchanted Quiver Bow arrows recast Multishot Raging Storm Bow of Badon Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Energy cost Cursed Staffs Armor Piercer AoE escalation Daggers Deadly Swipe Range Frost Staffs Avalanche Hoarfrost Staff Glacial Prison Chillhowl Hammers Seismic Tremor Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse Smite Sanctify Exalted Staff Maces Gravitas Morning Star Nature Staffs Thorn Growth Well of Life Wild Staff Quarterstaffs Mystic Rocks Staff of Balance Shapeshifter Staffs Hellfire Barrage Hellspawn Staff Spears Corrupting Steel Spirithunter Swords Heroic Charge Heroic Cleave Heroic Strike Iron Will Limit Breaker Infinity Blade Majestic Smash Kingmaker War Gloves Dragon Leap Earth Crusher Ravenstrike Cestus Fleet Footwork Gravitational Collapse Spiked Gauntlets Offhands Sacred Scepter Helmets Nasty Wounds Hood of Tenacity Energy Regain Energizing Shield Shoes Elbow Smash Judicator Boots Battle Mounts Lightning Storm Battle Eagle Earth Tornado Juggernaut Miscellaneous Item Power Tier 2 3 Armor abilities food lifesteal Roast Chicken Whitefog Snapper Roast Goose Clearhaze Snapper Roast Pork Puremist Snapper skillshot indicators Caltrops Ballista Support Fire Royal Helmets line of sight Dodge combat shoes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Resilience Penetration 50% 35% Time Freeze Great Arcane Staff Energy Cost 15 27 Cooldown 50s 72s Cooldown reduction 1s 2.5s per 100 IP

changes.raw_text: Starfall: Resilience Penetration: 50% → 35%
Time Freeze: Energy Cost: 15 → 27; Cooldown: 50s → 72s; Cooldown reduction per 100 IP: 1s → 2.5s
notes: Cooldown is reduced after 1466 IP

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Bloody Reap Infernal Scythe Cooldown 25s 20s Razor Cut Bear Paws Lifesteal 20% 15%

changes.raw_text: Bloody Reap: Cooldown: 25s → 20s
Razor Cut: Lifesteal strength: 20% → 15%
notes: Reduced to compensate for lifesteal bug fix returning correct health

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Deadly Shot Range 20m 18m Enchanted Quiver Bow initial arrows 6 4 additional recast 4 3 maximum 6 5 Physical attack bonus 230% 280% within 6m 185% 235% Cooldown 12s 10s Energy 19 11 Multishot knockback removed slow 30% 1s Cooldown 5s 3s Damage 115 127 Cast time 0.3s 0s Hit delay 0s 0.2s Range 12m 13m Raging Storm Bow of Badon direct damage Storm Duration 4.8s 5s DoT 1.8s 2s projectile accuracy

changes.raw_text: Deadly Shot: Range: 20m → 18m

Enchanted Quiver: Amount of initial arrows: 6 → 4; Additional arrows on recast: 4 → 3; Maximum arrows: 6 → 5; Physical attack bonus: 230% → 280%; With enemy within 6m: 185% → 235%; Cooldown: 12s → 10s; Energy cost: 19 → 11

Multishot: Removed knockback; Added: 30% slow for 1s; Cooldown: 5s → 3s; Damage: 115 → 127; Cast time: 0.3s → 0s (Stand time remains 0.2s); Hit delay: 0s → 0.2s; Range: 12m → 13m. Also more generous hitbox.
notes: Removed knockback
Added: 30% slow for 1s
Stand time remains 0.2s
More generous hitbox

changes.raw_text: Raging Storm: Initial impact damage now counts as direct damage. Storm Duration: 4.8s → 5s; DoT duration: 1.8s → 2s; Projectile accuracy increased at max range.
notes: Initial impact damage now counts as direct damage
Projectile accuracy increased at max range

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Divine Engine Energy Shaper Energy cost 0 29

changes.raw_text: Divine Engine: Energy cost: 0 → 29

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Armor Piercer Damage 130 110 Added AoE escalation resistance reduction

changes.raw_text: Armor Piercer: Damage: 130 → 110; Added missing AoE escalation to resistance reduction
notes: Added missing AoE escalation to resistance reduction

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Deadly Swipe Range 5m 4.5m

changes.raw_text: Deadly Swipe: Range: 5m → 4.5m

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Avalanche Hoarfrost Staff Slow no longer cleansable Glacial Prison Chillhowl Damage radius 8m 6m Damage 230 249

changes.raw_text: Avalanche: Slow no longer cleansable while in the snowball's trail
notes: Slow no longer cleansable while in the snowball's trail

changes.raw_text: Glacial Prison: Damage radius: 8m → 6m; Damage: 230 → 249
notes: Radius unified with VFX for better readability

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Seismic Tremor Channel time 1.8s 1.6s

changes.raw_text: Seismic Tremor: Channel time: 1.8s → 1.6s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Sacred Pulse Heal 40 94 no longer heals 5m radius Smite Cooldown 2s 3s Direct damage 100 151 Mark damage 30 43 Sanctify Exalted Staff Smokebomb Hellion Hood Time Corridor Occult Staff removes negative effects

changes.raw_text: Sacred Pulse: Heal: 40 → 94; No longer heals in a 5m radius around the target.
notes: No longer heals in a 5m radius around the target (changed to single target)

changes.raw_text: Smite: Cooldown: 2s → 3s; Direct damage: 100 → 151; Mark damage: 30 → 43
Sanctify: Now also removes negative enemy effects with buffing components: Smokebomb (Hellion Hood), Time Corridor (Occult Staff)
notes: Now also removes: Smokebomb (Hellion Hood)
Now also removes: Time Corridor (Occult Staff)

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Gravitas Morning Star Recast cooldown 45s 40s

changes.raw_text: Gravitas: Recast cooldown: 45s → 40s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Thorn Growth Initial area radius 0m 1m Well of Life Wild Staff Cooldown 25s 20s

changes.raw_text: Thorn Growth: Initial area radius: 0m → 1m
Well of Life: Cooldown: 25s → 20s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Mystic Rocks Staff of Balance Healing reduction slow aura radius 6m 6.5m

changes.raw_text: Mystic Rocks: Healing reduction and slow aura radius: 6m → 6.5m

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Hellfire Barrage Hellspawn Staff Disruption factor 0 5

changes.raw_text: Hellfire Barrage: Disruption factor: 0 → 5
notes: Reduces channel duration if hit while channeling

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Corrupting Steel Spirithunter Area no longer damage over time Area magical resistance 0.04 AoE escalation resistance reduction

changes.raw_text: Corrupting Steel: Area no longer deals damage over time. Area now decreases enemy magical resistance by an additional 0.04. Added AoE escalation to resistance reduction.
notes: Area no longer deals damage over time
Area now decreases enemy magical resistance by an additional 0.04
Added AoE escalation to resistance reduction

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Heroic Charge removed 9% movement speed Heroic Cleave Added 20% movement speed 5s on hit Heroic Strike Added 20% movement 3s on hit Iron Will Movement speed buff 10% 30% Limit Breaker Infinity Blade Removed slow Damage buff 5s 6s Cooldown 20s 25s Resilience Penetration 30% 25% Majestic Smash Kingmaker Hit delay 0.2s 0.1s Knock-up ignores diminishing returns

changes.raw_text: Heroic Charge: Removed: 9% Movement speed per stack
notes: Removed: 9% Movement speed per stack

changes.raw_text: Heroic Cleave: Added 20% movement speed buff for 5s on hit
notes: Added: 20% movement speed buff for 5s on hit

changes.raw_text: Heroic Strike: Added 20% movement speed buff for 3s on hit
notes: Added: 20% movement speed buff for 3s on hit

changes.raw_text: Iron Will: Movement speed buff: 10% → 30%
Limit Breaker: Removed slow. Damage buff duration: 5s → 6s; Cooldown: 20s → 25s; Resilience Penetration: 30% → 25%.
notes: Removed slow

changes.raw_text: Majestic Smash: Hit delay: 0.2s → 0.1s; Knock-up now ignores existing diminishing returns
notes: Knock-up now ignores existing diminishing returns (no longer stackable)

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Dragon Leap Stand time 0s 0.1s first cast Range 4.5m 4m first cast Earth Crusher Ravenstrike Cestus Knock-up duration 1.2s 1.4s Fleet Footwork Standtime 0.4s 0.35s Cooldown 3s 4s Dash range 7m 6m Gravitational Collapse Spiked Gauntlets Slow duration 4s 2s AoE escalation

changes.raw_text: Dragon Leap: Stand time: 0s → 0.1s (first cast only); Range: 4.5m → 4m (first cast only)
notes: Changes apply to first cast only

changes.raw_text: Earth Crusher: Knock-up duration: 1.2s → 1.4s
Fleet Footwork: Standtime: 0.4s → 0.35s; Cooldown: 3s → 4s; Dash range: 7m → 6m
Gravitational Collapse: Slow duration: 4s → 2s; Slow duration now benefits from AoE escalation
notes: Slow duration now benefits from AoE escalation

subsections.heading: Offhands
subsections.searchable_text: Offhands Sacred Scepter Crowd control resistance factor 1.2 1.8

changes.raw_text: Sacred Scepter: Crowd control resistance factor: 1.2 → 1.8

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Nasty Wounds Hood of Tenacity Area duration 2.5s 4s Energy Regain all Helmets reworked Energizing Shield absorbs 192 damage 3s 25% missing energy Cooldown 20s

changes.raw_text: Nasty Wounds: Area duration: 2.5s → 4s
Energy Regain has been reworked into Energizing Shield: Gain a shield absorbing up to 192 damage for 3s; Restores 25% of your missing energy; Cooldown: 20s.
notes: Reworked into new ability: Energizing Shield
Gain a shield absorbing up to 192 damage for 3s
Restores 25% of your missing energy
Cooldown: 20s

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Elbow Smash Judicator Boots Cooldown 25s 20s Range 11m 10m

changes.raw_text: Elbow Smash: Cooldown: 25s → 20s; Range: 11m → 10m

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts Lightning Storm Battle Eagle DoT duration 8s 6s Earth Tornado Juggernaut no longer pull mounted enemies

changes.raw_text: Lightning Storm: DoT duration: 8s → 6s
Earth Tornado: No longer able to pull mounted enemies
notes: No longer able to pull mounted enemies

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous Item Power Tier 2 300 500 Tier 3 500 600 Armor abilities Tier 2 Tier 3 second third active passive Dodge default first-slot combat shoes food lifesteal Roast Chicken Whitefog Snapper Roast Goose Clearhaze Snapper Roast Pork Puremist Snapper 25% reduced skillshot indicators Vicious Barrage Siegebow Spear Throw Heron Spear Polymorph Shapeshifter Staffs Raging Storm Bow of Badon line of sight Caltrops Crossbows Ballista Support Fire Royal Helmets

changes.raw_text: All Tier 2 armor has gained a second active and passive ability; All Tier 3 armor has gained a third active and passive ability
notes: All Tier 2 armor gained a second active and passive ability
All Tier 3 armor gained a third active and passive ability

changes.raw_text: Dodge is now the default first-slot ability for all combat shoes
notes: Dodge is now the default first-slot ability for all combat shoes

changes.raw_text: To maintain balance after fixing an issue with lifesteal returning less health than intended, the following foods have had their lifesteal values reduced by about 25%: Roast Chicken, Roasted Whitefog Snapper, Roast Goose, Roasted Clearhaze Snapper, Roast Pork, and Roasted Puremist Snapper
notes: Lifesteal values reduced by ~25% on: Roast Chicken, Roasted Whitefog Snapper, Roast Goose, Roasted Clearhaze Snapper, Roast Pork, Roasted Puremist Snapper

changes.ability: No longer require line of sight:
changes.raw_text: Caltrops (all Crossbows), Ballista Support Fire (Royal Helmets) — no longer require line of sight
notes: Caltrops (all Crossbows) — no longer requires line of sight
Ballista Support Fire (Royal Helmets) — no longer requires line of sight
